sourceScope.sourceReference: Canadian Institute of Actuaries educational note, January 2023
sourceScope.sourceStatusNote: Non-binding educational note / companion guidance; not authoritative regulatory text.

observedSectionWindows.note: Front matter, introduction, and method overview.
Forecast period, scenarios, and management actions.
Modelling considerations, basic requirements, and enterprise assumptions.
Reporting guidance, introduction, results, and ORSA coordination.
Appendix B/C - property and casualty insurers and closeout.

boundaries: Keep planning focused on this single educational note file.
Do not widen into other practice notes or broader companion sources in the same folder.
Keep VM-20, VM-21, VM-22, VM-30, VM-31, AG, and regulation references review-only unless a batch intentionally includes the referenced operational text.
Keep the educational-note caveat visible as companion-guidance context, not as authoritative regulatory text.
Use page locators as the primary citation anchor; stable line references are not expected for this PDF slice.
exclusions: No full-document processing outside this source file.
No eLearning scripts, slides, quizzes, or app exports.
No raw source files in Git.
No other educational note files in the same wave.

topicMap.boundaryNote: Keep the life-insurer risk-category appendix together as the main life-focused caution slice.

topicMap.label: Appendix B/C - property and casualty insurers and closeout
topicMap.boundaryNote: Keep the P&C appendix material and closeout together while preserving the end boundary.
